titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 132: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 132. (A.R. No. 175 of 1974.) TĀMARAIPPĀKKAM, CHENGAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Agnīśvara temple.

This inscription is evidently related to no. 109. It records the allotment of the common land attached to the village, Piḍārak kiḻārpūṇḍi and another pūṇḍi (name damaged) for feeding two brāhmaṇas as uttamāgram instead of three as had been arranged for earlier to be fed in the presence of Gurukkaḷ ie temple priest and subsequently one more kalam endowed for, by Piḷḷaiyār Adyirāmar. The land was entrusted to the kiḻārgaḷ of Tāmaraippākkam for management and making the due contribution for the above said feeding by Attimallan alias Kannaradēva-ppiritiyaṅgaraiyaṉ, son of Pṛitiyaṅgaraiyaṉ, the chief of Paṅgaḷa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakeśaripanmarkku yaāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu paṅkaḷa nā(ṭ)ṭuṭaiya pritiyaṅkaraiyaṉ makaṉ Attimallanākiya kaṉnaratevap piratiyaṅkaraiyaṉeṉ Innāṭṭup putanalappāṭi nāṭṭut tāmaraippākkattu mahādevarkku tāmaraippākkattoṭumaṭainta piṭārak kiḻār pūṇṭiyum ca
kai ṇṭi Iṇaipula melāṟṟūrk kālukku vaṭakkum nāṭṭuppaṭṭikkuk kiḻakkum ciṟṟettacceṟuvukkuk kiḻakku kaṟ(c) ceṟuvukkuñ ciṟṟettacceṟuvukkut teṟ(k)kum neṭṭerikkuk kiḻakkum Iṉṉilam Uṇṇilam moḻiviṉṟi Udakapūrvvañ ceytu kuṭutteṉ tāmaraippākkiḻārkaḷukkey kāṇi
ceytu kuṭutteṉ Iṉnilam Uḻutukoṇṭu māṇṭukoṇṭuṅ koṇṭu Ivarkaḷ ceyvatāṉa nimantam Uttamāgram kurukkaḷ muṉpu vaittu Uṇṇuvatāka kalam muṉṟumiṉṟi vaiytta kalam Iraṇṭum piḷḷaiyār Atiyirāmar vaitta kalamoṉṟum Āka muvar brahmāṇarkku tiyāna ve
lvaiyil Uṇpatāka vaittapaṭi perāl kuttalaraci Iru nāḻiyum perāl neyyāḻākkum perāl tayir nāḻiyum perāl kaṟinālum perāl talaikkeṇṇai Āḻākkum perāl veṟuṅkāy Ilaiyum peṟuvatākavum Ipparicut tāmaraippākkiḻārkaḷey yāṇṭu pūṇṭuñ cantirā
tittaṉ U(ru)ḷḷavu(ñ) celvatāka vaitteṉ kaṉṉaratevap piritiyaṅkaraiyanen Ittaṉmam rakṣippāṉnaṭi yeṉ talai melina Itu Iṟakkuvān kaṅkaiyiṭaik kumariy Eḻunūṟṟuk kātamāṟṟārc ceyta pāvattai paṭuvar Ivai poyyili Eḻuttu Ivai Aṉaiyaman Eḻuttu
Ivai puttuḻān Eḻuttu Ivai muḻuruṭaiyān Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
